name: Signature Design by Ashley 2pc Hammis Upholstered Side Chair Brown: Vinyl Seat, Wood Legs, Mid-Century Modern
description: If contemporary tantalizes your taste buds, savor the beauty of this sleek upholstered dining room side chair. Rake back design complements an open and airy aesthetic. Dark and dramatic finish makes a bold, beautiful statement. Made with select birch veneer and hardwood solids in a transitional dark brown finish with gray undertones. Signature Design by Ashley is a registered trademark of Ashley Furniture Industries, Inc.
